sources.provider: BfV service page (Federal Office for the Protection of the Constitution)
sources.comment: Official English BfV service page covering reporting, prevention support and exit-programme information.
German DSN Austria news page used as the closest official replacement for the unavailable English-language surface.
ISD publications page retained for formal extremism and online-threat reports.
English site of the Belgian Coordination Unit for Threat Analysis (CUTA) providing information on the general threat level in Belgium; replacement for the OCAM/OCAD English page.
Danish Police Intelligence Service English news for terrorism threat assessment and prevention context.
Norwegian Police Security Service (PST) English page for reporting suspicious activity; describes PST's role and threat landscape; accessible alternative to the unavailable English news page.
RUSI terrorism and conflict research-group page with stale query parameter removed.
Press-room news page of the Swedish Security Service (Sakerhetspolisen) in English, listing recent news and updates about security threats.

sources.provider: SUPO Finland news and press releases
sources.comment: News and press releases page of Finland's Security and Intelligence Service (SUPO) in English, offering recent press releases and statements.
